articles.author: Eric Revell
articles.title: How the Iran war could hit Americans’ grocery bills - Fox Business
articles.description: The Iran war is driving oil shock that may reshape consumer spending patterns as businesses face mounting transportation costs and difficult pricing pressures.
articles.content:
High oil prices due to the Iran war are pushing gasoline prices higher and that could lead to grocery bills rising for American consumers
.
